zh.Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: Edward de Évreaux於0995年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾。他於1025年與Maude FitzHubert在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德。

zh-hans.Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edward de Évreaux于0995年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾。他于1025年与Maude FitzHubert在法国諾門迪结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: Edward de Évreaux was born in 0995, in Eure, Upper Normandy, France. He married Maude FitzHubert in 1025, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Edward de Évreaux est né en 0995, à Eure, Haute-Normandie, France. Il a épousé Maude FitzHubert en 1025, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé à Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Edward de Évreaux wurde 0995 in Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Er hat 1025 in Normandie, Frankreich Maude FitzHubert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Edward de Évreaux è nato il nel 0995 nel Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Lui sposato Maude FitzHubert nel 1025, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリンプスフィールド
ja.Normandy, France: フランスノーマンディ
ja.Évreaux, Eure, Haute-Normandy, France: フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウア
ja.lifeSummary: Edward de Évreauxは0995年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアで生まれた。1025年にフランスノーマンディでMaude FitzHubertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリンプスフィールドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward de Évreaux(은)는 0995년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르에서 태어났다. 그는 1025년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Maude FitzHubert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 브림프스필드에서 사망했다.

mn.Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England: Brimpsfield, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Edward de Évreaux nasceu em 0995, em Eure, Haute-Normandie, França. Ele casou-se com Maude FitzHubert em 1025, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Edward de Évreaux родился в 0995 г. в местности эур, хауте-норманди, Франция. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude FitzHubert в 1025 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в местности бримпсфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Edward de Évreaux nació en 0995, en Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Se casó con Maude FitzHubert en 1025, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
